data.title: Columbia Sportswear (Nasdaq: COLM) to reveal Q4 2025 financial results on Feb 3, 2026, at 4:05 p.m. ET with CFO commentary at 4:15 p.m. ET.
data.description: Columbia Sportswear Company (Nasdaq: COLM) is set to announce its fourth quarter 2025 financial results on Tuesday, February 3, 2026, around 4:05 p.m. ET. Following this, at about 4:15 p.m. ET, Jim Swanson, the Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer, will provide insights on the financial results for the fourth quarter of 2025. The commentary will be shared with the SEC through Form 8-K and will also be accessible on the company's website at https://investor.columbia.com/financial-results.

data.title: Lyft (Nasdaq: LYFT) to release Q4 and full-year 2025 financial results on Feb 10, 2026 after market close. Conference call at 2 pm PT.
data.description: Ride-sharing company Lyft, Inc. will announce its financial results for Q4 and full-year 2025 on February 10, 2026, after the market closes. A conference call will be held on the same day at 2:00 p.m. PT (5:00 p.m. ET) to discuss these results and business highlights. To participate in the live audio webcast, viewers can go to Lyft's Investor Relations page at https://investor.lyft.com. The company is listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol LYFT.

data.title: SITE Centers in Beachwood, Ohio, reveals tax allocations for 2025 dividend distributions through a press release.
data.description: SITE Centers Corporation, headquartered in Beachwood, Ohio, has disclosed the tax allocations for their 2025 dividend distributions. The company announced that the total amount of dividends for the year amounted to a significant figure. These tax allocations provide important information for shareholders to accurately report their taxable income for the year.

data.title: TransAct appoints Dana Loof as Chief Marketing Officer to boost growth. She will lead global marketing with a focus on brand leadership and technology portfolio adoption.
data.description: In HAMDEN, Connecticut, TransAct Technologies Incorporated (Nasdaq: TACT) has appointed Dana Loof as Chief Marketing Officer. Loof, with over 30 years of experience, will oversee TransAct's global marketing team. Her role will involve enhancing brand presence, improving market strategies, and boosting the uptake of the company's expanding technology products. This move is aimed at driving growth and maximizing the impact of TransAct's offerings in the market.

data.title: Curbline Properties declares 2025 dividend allocations; stockholders should report on 1099-DIV for tax returns.
data.description: Curbline Properties Corp. (NYSE: CURB), a company that owns convenience centers in affluent suburban areas, recently disclosed the tax allocations for the 2025 distributions on its common stock. Stockholders of Curbline Properties Corp. will find the allocation of 2025 distributions summarized in Form 1099-DIV. These amounts, detailed on the form, should be included in stockholders’ 2025 federal income tax returns. This information is vital for those who hold common stock in the company.

data.title: InvenTrust Properties Corp. provides tax reporting info for 2025 distributions on common stock (NYSE: IVT) per Form 1099-DIV.
data.description: DOWNERS GROVE, Ill.-- InvenTrust Properties Corp. revealed the tax details for the 2025 distributions on its common stock. On a per share basis, the tax information for COMMON SHARES (NYSE: IVT) with CUSIP # 46124J201 includes: Record Date, Payable Date, Total Distribution Per Share, Distribution Allocated to 2025, Total Ordinary Dividends, and Sec. 897 Ordinary Dividends. This information will be reported on the Form 1099-DIV.

data.title: SurgePays (NASDAQ: SURG) announces underwritten public offering of common stock and/or pre-funded warrants. Size/terms unknown.
data.description: BARTLETT, Tennessee - On January 20, 2026, SurgePays, Inc. (NASDAQ: SURG), a company specializing in wireless and fintech point of sale services catering to subprime and underserved demographics, announced the initiation of an underwritten public offering of its common stock and/or pre-funded warrants. The company will be offering all shares of common stock and/or pre-funded warrants in the offering. The completion and final terms of the offering are contingent on market conditions, with no definite assurance on the timing or size of the offering.

data.title: Sprouts Farmers Market (Nasdaq: SFM) will report Q4 & full year 2025 earnings on Feb 19, 2026 after market close. Conference call at 5pm ET.
data.description: Phoenix-based company Sprouts Farmers Market, Inc. (Nasdaq: SFM) disclosed plans to reveal its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year that concluded on December 28, 2025. The announcement is scheduled to occur post-market closure on Thursday, February 19, 2026. Subsequent to the announcement, Sprouts’ management is set to hold a conference call at 5:00 p.m. ET to deliberate on the outcomes for the quarter and entire year. A webcast of the conference call will be accessible at investors.sprouts.com. Interested participants are advised to sign up on the website before the event.

data.title: Hasbro will reveal Q4 and full-year 2025 earnings on Feb 10, 2026 - an important update for investors and stakeholders.
data.description: Toy company Hasbro, based in Pawtucket, Rhode Island, will reveal its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025 on February 10, 2026. This announcement will include details on the company's performance and earnings for the specified periods. Stay tuned for insights into Hasbro's progress and financial standing during the last part of 2025.

data.title: James D. Harding promoted to Managing Director at Century Fasteners Corp., responsible for strategic direction and expansion.
data.description: James D. Harding has been appointed as the Managing Director of Century Fasteners Corp. He will now oversee strategic direction, operational leadership, and the company's expansion. In this role, James will collaborate with senior leadership to further the company's mission and growth.

data.title: Erasca plans $150M public stock offering on Nasdaq (ERAS), also granting underwriters option for additional $22.5M shares.
data.description: On January 20, 2026, Erasca, Inc. (Nasdaq: ERAS), a company specializing in precision oncology for RAS/MAPK pathway-driven cancers, announced plans for a public offering. They aim to offer $150.0 million in shares of common stock, with the potential for an additional $22.5 million through the underwriters. The completion and final terms of the offering are subject to market conditions.

data.title: Corvus Pharmaceuticals plans to offer $150 million of common stock and pre-funded warrants in a public offering.
data.description: On January 20, 2026, Corvus Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (Nasdaq: CRVS), a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company based in South San Francisco, announced the initiation of an underwritten public offering. The offering consists of $150,000,000 in shares of common stock and pre-funded warrants to acquire shares of common stock for certain investors. Corvus will be offering all the shares and warrants in the deal. Additionally, the company plans to give underwriters a 30-day option to buy up to an extra $22,500,000 in common stock at the public offering price before discounts and commissions. The completion of the offering depends on market conditions and other factors, making it uncertain if or when it will be finalized, along with the final size and terms of the offering.

data.title: RB Global (NYSE: RBA, TSX: RBA) to release Q4, 2025 financial results on Feb 17, 2026, followed by a conference call at 4:30pm ET.
data.description: RB Global, Inc. (NYSE: RBA) (TSX: RBA) disclosed it will unveil its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025 after the market closes on February 17, 2026. Following this announcement, the company is set to conduct a conference call at 4:30 p.m. Eastern time on the same day to delve into the results. For interested analysts and institutional investors, prior registration is available to join the conference call through the provided link: https://events.q4inc.com/analyst/991675578?pwd=s7B00vZU.

data.title: Roots partners with Metro Supply Chain for 10 years, moving distribution to Ontario facility, boosting efficiency.
data.description: In Toronto, Roots (TSX: ROOT) disclosed a 10-year strategic collaboration with Canadian logistics partner Metro Supply Chain. The move entails transferring Roots distribution operations from their current facility to Metro's Ontario location. Metro Supply Chain, a top privately-owned logistics provider in Canada, delivers comprehensive, data-oriented supply chain services. This new partnership signals a significant shift for Roots and is poised to enhance their distribution operations fundamentally.

data.title: MANSCAPED® launches The Lawn Mower® 5.0 Ultra Desert Sand, a refined groin and body hair trimmer in neutral color.
data.description: SAN DIEGO – MANSCAPED®, a leading men’s grooming company, has introduced The Lawn Mower® 5.0 Ultra Desert Sand. This latest version of the popular groin and body hair trimmer offers advanced features and improved performance in a sleek neutral color, exuding sophistication and confidence. The product aims to make grooming below the belt less daunting. MANSCAPED® continues to innovate, catering to its global consumer base with this updated offering.

data.title: Upwork (Nasdaq: UPWK) will report Q4 and FY 2025 financial results on Feb 9, 2026, after market close. Q&A call at 2pm PT.
data.description: Palo Alto-based Upwork Inc. (Nasdaq: UPWK) disclosed plans to unveil their financial performance for Q4 and full year of 2025 on February 9, 2026, after the market closure. The report will be followed by a Q&A conference call scheduled for 2:00 p.m. PT (5:00 p.m. ET) on the same day. Upwork is a leading global platform connecting freelancers and employers, utilizing both human expertise and AI technology.
